pi_items.source: File inspection: hl7-v2.3-oru-r01-1.hl7 contains valid HL7 v2.3 message with MSH segment showing version 2.3
File inspection: MSH segment field 9 contains 'ORU^R01' (Observation Result, Result Message Type 01)
Task description explicitly states channel should transform 'HL7 format to XML' with transformed output written to files
Task specification - this is the required channel name per task description

privileged_info_summary: No actual privileged information (PII/PHI) present. Sample data is fully synthetic with placeholder values: patient ID '00000-0000000', name 'AAAAAAAA^AAAAAA^A', provider 'donaldduck' (Disney character). The HL7 v2.3 ORU^R01 sample message contains 9 observation (OBX) segments with CPT vaccine codes (90707, 90737, 90731) representing immunization records. All dates and medical record numbers are placeholder values designed for testing only.
